title: Buttondown vs Mailgun (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Buttondown vs Mailgun: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Buttondown and Mailgun comes down to your specific use case. Buttondown is built for developers and technical writers who prefer markdown, while Mailgun targets developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

comparison_table.tool_a: Developers And Technical Writers Who Prefer Markdown
comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on developers and technical writers who prefer markdown
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Buttondown wins for developers and technical writers who prefer markdown, while Mailgun is stronger for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Buttondown or Mailgun?
faq.a: Buttondown starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Mailgun to Buttondown?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
